zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bushnell Sr於1492年在英國英格蘭波克夏提勒爾斯特受洗時，他的父親William Bushnell26歲，母親Margaret Beck24歲。他於1517年與Alice Klingham在英國英格蘭波克夏提勒爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年10月20日在他的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏提勒爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bushnell Sr于1492年在英国英格兰波克夏提勒爾斯特受洗时，他的父亲William Bushnell26岁，母亲Margaret Beck24岁。他于1517年与Alice Klingham在英国英格兰波克夏提勒爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年10月20日在他的家乡享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏提勒爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bushnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushnells Green in Bucklebury (Berkshire), early recorded as Bushenell or Busshendhill.
History: Francis Bushnell came to New Haven, CT, in 1639, and was a founder of Guilford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bushnell Sr was christened in 1492, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bushnell, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Beck, was 24. He married Alice Klingham in 1517, in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 October 1585, in his hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bushnell Sr a été baptisé en 1492, à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bushnell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beck, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice Klingham en 1517, à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1585, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Tilehurst, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bushnell Sr 1492 in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater William Bushnell 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Beck 24. Er hat 1517 in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Klingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1585 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tilehurst, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bushnell Sr è stato battezzato nel 1492 nel Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bushnell, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Beck, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice Klingham nel 1517, nel Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 ottobre 1585, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bushnell Srが1492年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストで洗礼を受けた時，父William Bushnellは26歳，母Margaret Beckは24歳であった。1517年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストでAlice Klinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年10月20日に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアティレハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bushnell Sr(이)가 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bushnell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Beck(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 틸후르스트에서 Alice Klingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 10월 20일 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 틸후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bushnell Sr foi batizado em 1492, em Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bushnell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beck, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Klingham em 1517, em Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1585, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bushnell Sr был крещен в 1492 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bushnell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beck, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Klingham в 1517 г. в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 октября 1585 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности тилэурст, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bushnell Sr se bautizó en 1492, en Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bushnell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Beck, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice Klingham en 1517, en Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1585, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Tilehurst, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
